title: Cooking Show
description:
Instead of a dry, dime-a-dozen podcast format, have guests on to discuss MIDAO over a cooking challenge./nEach episode, a Marshall Islander will submit a traditional recipe, and our onscreen team will attempt to recreate it.
For best results, film in NYC (lots of industry guests at hand) and have someone from the MI Permanent Mission judge the final result.
Performing an activity also engages the audience's mirror neurons in a way that podcasts do not.

title: Example: Explainer Video
description:
Break down the core product in 90 seconds.
Use simple visuals, no jargon.
End with a clear CTA.

title: Example: Community AMA
description:
Host a live Q&A session.
Collect questions in advance.
Record and repurpose clips for social.
